Mercury's Direct motion is beneficial to people, while his
Exceedingly Retrograde motion brings about economic ruin of the
country through famine. His Retrograde motion produces threat of
war, while his Deformed motion causes panic and diseases.

Next the author gives the effects of Mercury's visibility and
disappearance in the different lunar months.]

If Mercury becomes visible in the lunar months of Pausa,
Asadha, Sravana, Vai^akha and Magha, there will be great danger
to the world. But if he remains eclipsed (invisible) during these
months, he will prove auspicious.
